flowPaths.label: Order food (happy path)
flowPaths.description: Full journey from phone entry through delivery tracking.

flowPaths.label: Auth & setup only
flowPaths.description: Onboarding through location before the home feed.

flowPaths.label: Discover & search
flowPaths.description: Home hub and search without completing checkout.

flowPaths.label: Menu to tracking
flowPaths.description: Restaurant menu through place order and live tracking.

screens.label: Onboarding
screens.purpose: Collect a 10-digit mobile number and send the user to OTP verification.

capabilities.label: Mobile number input
capabilities.description: Accepts 10-digit Indian mobile number with +91 prefix; enables CTA when valid.

capabilities.label: Request verification code
capabilities.description: Submits phone and navigates to OTP screen.

states.label: Default
states.summary: Logo hero, +91 field, CTA disabled until 10 digits.

states.label: Valid number
states.summary: CTA enabled when phone input is complete.

screens.label: OTP Verification
screens.purpose: Confirm identity with a 4-digit code before location setup.

capabilities.label: OTP digit entry
capabilities.description: Four single-digit fields; auto-advance between boxes.

capabilities.label: Verify code
capabilities.description: Validates 4 digits and advances to location.

capabilities.label: Resend code
capabilities.description: Placeholder resend affordance (stub in prototype).

states.label: Default
states.summary: Four OTP boxes, masked phone, resend link.

states.label: Code complete
states.summary: Verify button enabled when 4 digits entered.

screens.label: Location Access
screens.purpose: Capture delivery location via GPS or manual entry before the home feed.

capabilities.label: Use current location
capabilities.description: Simulates GPS permission and jumps to home with delivery zone.

capabilities.label: Enter address manually
capabilities.description: Skips GPS and opens home (manual flow stub).

screens.label: Home
screens.purpose: Primary discovery hub: search, service modes, offers, and restaurant cards.

capabilities.label: Service mode cards
capabilities.description: Food delivery, Instamart, Dineout, Genie — visual entry points.

capabilities.label: Restaurant browsing
capabilities.description: Scrollable restaurant cards with ratings and ETA.

capabilities.label: Open search
capabilities.description: Navigates to search from search bar or tab.

capabilities.label: Open restaurant menu
capabilities.description: Food card navigates to restaurant detail.

states.label: Default
states.summary: Service cards, restaurant list, bottom tab bar.

states.label: Cart bar visible
states.summary: Floating cart bar after items added on restaurant flow.

screens.label: Search
screens.purpose: Let users search dishes and jump to restaurants from recent queries.

capabilities.label: Search query
capabilities.description: Text field for dish or restaurant search (UI only in prototype).

capabilities.label: Recent search shortcut
capabilities.description: Tapping a recent row opens restaurant detail.

screens.label: Restaurant Detail
screens.purpose: Browse menu items, adjust quantities, and open the cart checkout path.

capabilities.label: Menu browsing
capabilities.description: Category sections with veg/non-veg markers and prices.

capabilities.label: Add to cart
capabilities.description: Increments item quantity and updates cart summary bar.

capabilities.label: Open cart
capabilities.description: Cart bar navigates to checkout screen.

states.label: Default
states.summary: Menu with add buttons and veg markers.

states.label: Items in cart
states.summary: Quantity steppers and bottom cart summary bar.

screens.label: Cart & Checkout
screens.purpose: Review line items, fees, address, and place the order.

capabilities.label: Bill breakdown
capabilities.description: Shows item total, delivery fee, taxes, and grand total.

capabilities.label: Place order
capabilities.description: Submits order and navigates to live tracking.

capabilities.label: Empty state
capabilities.description: Placeholder when cart has zero items (?state=empty).

states.label: Empty cart
states.summary: Placeholder when no items in cart.

states.label: With items
states.summary: Line items, bill breakdown, place order CTA.

screens.label: Live Tracking
screens.purpose: Show ETA and step-by-step delivery progress after checkout.

capabilities.label: Delivery timeline
capabilities.description: Animated steps from confirmed → preparing → on the way → delivered.

capabilities.label: ETA display
capabilities.description: Shows estimated arrival time at top of screen.
